{{Quote|What I'd like you to keep in mind is that is that I'm your lifeline to the Alliance; I also have the power to have your letter of marque revoked. Just so we understand each other…''Captain''.|Hast to Urias Xhaxin|<ref name="PP" />}}
'''Hast''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served with both the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]].

==Biography==
Hast, a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]], attended the [[Imperial Academy/Legends|Imperial Academy]] before serving as a [[Pit Lieutenant]] aboard the [[Valiant (starship)|''Valiant'']] under [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Oweg]] and [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Vensell]].<ref name="Might">{{WEGCite|story=The Full Might of the Empire|book=Imperial Sourcebook|reprint=1}}</ref> Hast later resigned his commission at the end of his tour, and joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]. Assigned to [[Ordnance and Supply/Legends|Ordnance and Supply]], he served as a [[Special Agent/Legends|Special Agent]] under [[Ral'Rai Muvunc]], observing [[Privateer/Legends|privateer]] [[Starship/Legends|starships]] used by the Alliance.<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|II|24|Hast (I)}}</ref>

After three [[Standard year/Legends|years]], Hast was posted to the privateer starship ''[[Free Lance]]'' commanded by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Urias Xhaxin]] as an [[Alliance observer]]. The two men did not get along well, and Hast's tour of observation was marked by almost perpetual argument, with Hast second guessing the captain.<ref name="PP" />
